data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Post-experience photo sharing', but the evidence does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. While the linked use case mentions that photos are shared to a group album post-tour, there is no specific evidence demonstrating how this is implemented or validated through API interactions. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to satisfy the requirement.
gaps: No concrete evidence of API interactions or state checks confirming the functionality of post-experience photo sharing.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the post-experience photo sharing requirement.
